rationale: Both candidates independently surfaced the key latent gap — the unswept get_cache_scale call in hunyuan_image3_transformer.py — with concrete file/line evidence, matching the LATENT GAP CHECK. Y goes further by verifying the AutoWeightsLoader mapping mechanism against actual vLLM source and identifying a real test-design weakness (the delegated-loader test bypasses AutoWeightsLoader entirely), which closely echoes the human reviewer's real-checkpoint-validation concern that X never mentions. X is broader in scan coverage and gives more discrete action items, but pads its findings with two low-value 'add an explanatory comment' nitpicks and misses the ground-truth test-coverage caveat, giving it slightly lower recall and precision than Y.
